channel.title: Rama H. S. Rao — Senior Highway Engineer | Availability feed
channel.description: Availability and updates from Rama H. S. Rao, BEng (PhD), FCIHT, FIHE, CDMC — Senior Project & Highway Engineer based in London, UK.

image.title: Rama H. S. Rao — Senior Highway Engineer

item.title: Available immediately — Senior Highway Engineer (BEng, FCIHT, FIHE, CDMC) seeking next role
item.dc:creator: Rama H. S. Rao
item.description:
Rama H. S. Rao, BEng (Civil), Trained Landscape Designer, CDMC certified, Fellow of CIHT and IHE, CDM 2015 Principal Designer and Road Safety Auditor (RSA Modules 1–2), is available immediately for senior highway, traffic and transport engineering roles across the United Kingdom.

25+ years of delivery experience across Transport for London (TfL), the TfL Road Network (TLRN), nine London boroughs (Hillingdon, Camden, Brent, Ealing, Haringey, Islington, Newham, Westminster, Hounslow), Slough Borough Council, Oxfordshire County Council, Surrey County Council, and consultancies including WSP.

Open to permanent, fixed-term contract, day-rate contract or interim work. Five days a week on-site, happy to relocate anywhere in the UK.

Portfolio: engineer-rama-rao.github.io
CV (PDF): Full CV · 1-page summary
Book a call: calendly.com/engineer_rama/30min
Contact: +44 7714 102248 · rama_h_s@hotmail.com
